en: The Song of Songs, which is Solomon's.
zh: 所羅門的歌，是歌中之歌。

en: Let him kiss me with the kisses of his mouth! For your love is better than wine;
zh: 願他用口中的熱吻與我親嘴， 因為你的熱愛比酒更美。

en: your anointing oils are fragrant; your name is oil poured out; therefore virgins love you.
zh: 你的膏油香氣芬芳； 你的名字如同倒出來的膏油； 所以眾童女都愛你。

en: Draw me after you; let us run. The king has brought me into his chambers. We will exult and rejoice in you; we will extol your love more than wine; rightly do they love you.
zh: 願你吸引我，我們必快跑跟隨你。 王領我進入他的內室。 王啊！我們要因你歡喜快樂； 我們要提說你的愛，勝過提說美酒； 她們愛你是合理的。

en: I am very dark, but lovely, O daughters of Jerusalem, like the tents of Kedar, like the curtains of Solomon.
zh: 耶路撒冷的眾女子啊！ 我雖然黑，卻是秀美， 如同基達的帳棚， 好像所羅門的幔幕。

en: Do not gaze at me because I am dark, because the sun has looked upon me. My mother's sons were angry with me; they made me keeper of the vineyards, but my own vineyard I have not kept!
zh: 你們不要因為我黑，就盯著我， 因為太陽把我曬黑了。 我母親的兒子生我的氣； 他們叫我看守家裡的葡萄園， 我自己私人的葡萄園，我卻沒有看守。

en: Tell me, you whom my soul loves, where you pasture your flock, where you make it lie down at noon; for why should I be like one who veils herself beside the flocks of your companions?
zh: 我心所愛的啊！求你告訴我， 你在哪裡放羊？ 中午你在哪裡使羊群躺臥休息。 我為甚麼在你眾同伴的羊群旁邊， 好像蒙著臉的女人呢？

en: If you do not know, O most beautiful among women, follow in the tracks of the flock, and pasture your young goats beside the shepherds' tents.
zh: 你這女子中最美麗的啊！ 你若不知道， 可以出去，跟隨羊群的腳蹤， 在牧人的帳棚邊， 牧放你的山羊羔。

en: I compare you, my love, to a mare among Pharaoh's chariots.
zh: 我的佳偶啊！我把你 比作套在法老車上的駿馬。

en: Your cheeks are lovely with ornaments, your neck with strings of jewels.
zh: 你的兩腮因耳環顯得秀麗； 你的頸項因珠鍊顯得華美。

en: We will make for you ornaments of gold, studded with silver.
zh: 我們要為你製金耳環， 用銀珠點綴。

en: While the king was on his couch, my nard gave forth its fragrance.
zh: 王正坐席的時候， 我的哪噠香膏散發芬芳的香味，

en: My beloved is to me a sachet of myrrh that lies between my breasts.
zh: 我以我的良人為一袋沒藥， 掛在我的胸懷之中。

en: My beloved is to me a cluster of henna blossoms in the vineyards of Engedi.
zh: 我以我的良人為一束鳳仙花， 開放在隱．基底的葡萄園裡。

en: Behold, you are beautiful, my love; behold, you are beautiful; your eyes are doves.
zh: 我的佳偶啊！你很美麗； 你很美麗。 你的眼好像鴿子的眼睛。

en: Behold, you are beautiful, my beloved, truly delightful. Our couch is green;
zh: 我的良人，你很英俊， 你很可愛。 我們的床榻是青綠的樹木；

en: the beams of our house are cedar; our rafters are pine.
zh: 我們房屋的棟梁是香柏樹， 房屋的椽子是松樹。
